task: Analyze the provided Git repository fixture and identify the code nodes most relevant to the selected issue.

issue.title: Repository analysis hangs while parsing a Python repo
issue.body: A request to build repository analysis reaches the analysis service and then never completes once parser/services.py starts scanning files. The HTTP view only forwards the request.

comments.body: The same repo works if parser scanning is bypassed, so start from the analysis-to-parser handoff rather than the view layer.

tools.name: list_repo_files
tools.description: List bounded Python files in the provided repository.

tools.name: search_repo_symbols
tools.description: Search Python functions/classes in the repository and rank them against issue evidence.

tools.name: read_repo_file
tools.description: Read bounded Python file contents from the repository.
